---
title: Finite-amplitude Lagrangian-mean wave activity applied to the baroclinic eddy
  life-cycle
pagetitle: 2012-10-1-Solomon2012 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2012
author: Abraham Solomon, Gang Chen and Jian Lu
venue: J. Atmos. Sci.
venue_cit: <i>J. Atmos. Sci.</i>, 69, 3013--3027, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0294.1.
recommended_citation: 'Abraham Solomon, Gang Chen and Jian Lu, 2012: Finite-amplitude
  Lagrangian-mean wave activity applied to the baroclinic eddy life-cycle, <i>J. Atmos.
  Sci.</i>, 69, 3013--3027, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0294.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0294.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Finite-amplitude Lagrangian-mean wave activity applied to the baroclinic eddy life-cycle

*Published in J. Atmos. Sci., 2012*

**Recommended citation:** Abraham Solomon, Gang Chen and Jian Lu, 2012: Finite-amplitude Lagrangian-mean wave activity applied to the baroclinic eddy life-cycle, <i>J. Atmos. Sci.</i>, 69, 3013--3027, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-11-0294.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/abs/10.1175/JAS-D-11-0294.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
